steps.title: Use the contrast and example
steps.content: The text contrasts Takeuchi Seihu with Asai Chu, who used European methods. The example says Takeuchi made Tabby Cat with color pigments on silk, so he used traditional Japanese approaches positively.

steps.title: Match the attitude
steps.content: Choice A means distrusted, and Choice B means ignored; both conflict with actually using the methods. Choice D does not sensibly describe an artistic approach. The needed word means adopted or accepted. The answer is C.
